title: Alpha7 2 Pack Waterproof Bed sheet for Single bed 200x100cm Perfect for potty training & everyday spills Sofa protection from Pets Perfect for kids, adults, and pets. Easy to wash
features: Protects mattress from spills & stains! Great for toilet/potty training! Comfortably fits single mattresses! Long-lasting protection! Easy to clean- wipe clean or soak in warm soapy water. Size: 200 x 100cm.
description: Product Description Waterproof Bed Cover for Single bed 200x100cm This Waterproof Bed Cover by Cuddles exclusive to Rysons is great for protecting mattresses from spills & stains, especially when toilet training children. Simply fit the waterproof bed cover over the mattress and cover with the bed sheet. If any accidents occur during the night, wipe the sheet clean. The cover features a waterproof layer which works as a barrier against any potential accidents, keeping the mattress free from moisture damage. Designed with comfort in mind the breathable fabric also helps with promoting cool airflow, increasing the comfort you experience. The cover is also extremely easy to clean- simply wipe clean or soak in warm soapy water. Plus, the cover gives long-lasting protection as it is made from durable, quality materials! The cover easily, but snugly fits single mattresses, preventing the cover from moving during the night and causing discomfort. This Waterproof Bed Cover is great for protecting mattresses from spills & stains, especially when toilet training children. Simply fit the waterproof bed cover over the mattress and cover with the bed sheet. If any accidents occur during the night, wipe the sheet clean.
